name: powerbi-modeling-codex
description: Codex plugin for operating Power BI semantic models and PBIR report projects through the official modeling MCP plus a local report authoring MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Connect and edit Power BI semantic models from Codex
interface.longDescription: Provides a Codex skill and local MCP wiring for Power BI semantic model operations plus PBIR report authoring workflows, including pages, visuals, bookmarks, same-report and cross-report drillthrough, tooltips, visual interactions, slicer sync, grouped compositions, field-parameter wiring, mobile layouts, and interactive controls.
defaultPrompt: Connect to my PBIX in Power BI Desktop and list tables/columns.
Create or update a DAX measure using measure_operations.
Open my PBIR project and create a clustered column chart on a new page.
Configure a drillthrough page, cross-report drillthrough target, tooltip page, page navigator, or synced slicers in my PBIR report.
Create a field parameter and bind it to a report visual or slicer.
Group visuals, set visibility or layer order, and align or distribute report compositions.
Generate or edit mobile layout metadata for visuals in my PBIR report.
Validate model and report changes and summarize what was modified.
